creator: mark@grondar.za
text:
Andreas Klemm wrote:
> > The new KerberosIV is not fully committed yet. Please give me a day or 
> > three to get it in before reporting further. I will _delete_ sec/eBones.
> 
> Had the same problems with old version as well.
> But okay, no problem !

Sorry I was not clear. You are not using the new kerberos _at_all_. :-)

There will be a bunch of userland changes in a day or three; _then_ 
try it.

Erm - I'd be quite grateful if you could close this PR - there is 
already an open PR covering the brokennes of the old eBones in 
3.0-CURRENT.

M
--
Mark Murray
